subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath attained the presence of his Lord, the Mighty, the Most High, until he entered the prison-abode [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی فاز بلقاء ربه العزیز المتعال الی ان دخل السجن مقر
subcodes.subjects: @Primal Will and the Word; Remembrance; Manifestation of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
